jobs.description:
We are seeking a results-oriented Instock Manager for the Other Hardlines Categories in GCC. The Instock Manager will be responsible for all aspects of the Instock role, including driving improved in-stock, inventory planning and forecasting. Additionally, you will drive initiatives to improve customer experience by working collaboratively across Retail, supply chain and operations. The ideal candidate will excel in scalable process improvement, analytics, written/verbal communication and be customer obsessed. The candidate will have proven experience delivering results by partnering with others and be comfortable leading and contributing across a range of topic outside of the core ISM responsibilities.

As Instock Manager, you will focus on delivering improvements at the GCC level, partnering with vendors and various functional teams and individuals at all levels of the organization to improve internal and external processes while continuously improving operational metrics. You will own the relationship of a set of Other Hardlines vendors and related long-term Supply Chain optimization goals, with the aim of reducing our overall cost to serve, contributing to the growth and scale of the category and to maximize the service level for our customers.


Key job responsibilities

- Manage availability and inventory health including: improved in-stock rates, inventory planning and systematic forecasting for key categories
- Driving meaningful data driven solutions to solve complex supply chain problems
- Developing dashboards to enable better team efficiency through automation
- Create and run buying/forecasting scenarios and enable better buying decisions to ensure continuous improvement in the buying process
- Step changing the vendors’ operational performance by acting as their internal consultant on forecasting/buying/operations domain

Overview
The L3 associate acts as the primary interface between Amazon and our delivery partners, so to our delivery partners- you ARE Amazon. L3 Associates are expected to identify DP concerns and work on troubleshooting delivery partner issues and provide process improvement suggestions.

Summary of Responsibilities
- Effectively communicate in a clear and professional manner at all times
- Provides/ expedites prompt and efficient service to Amazon customers/ delivery partners
- Effectively manage sensitive cases by reporting up the escalation matrix
- Demonstrate excellent time-management skills
- Maintains or exceeds targeted performance metrics
- Actively seek solutions through logical reasoning and identify trends to suggest process improvements

jobs.description:
Join Amazon Ads to partner with Korea's leading brands and help them reach customers globally through innovative advertising solutions. In this role, you'll serve as a strategic advisor to senior executives, building customized advertising strategies that drive measurable business outcomes across Amazon's owned properties, premium publisher networks, and millions of Fire TV and mobile devices.

As an Account Executive for Amazon Ads, you'll work with Korea-based advertisers across various industries to unlock growth through our search, display, and video advertising tools. Your day might include presenting strategic media solutions to C-level executives, collaborating with our global advertising teams to optimize campaign performance across different regions, or exploring new advertising opportunities that help clients expand their presence on Amazon. You'll dive into campaign analytics to understand what's working, then translate those insights into recommendations that drive real business impact. Throughout it all, you'll coordinate across multiple teams—from account managers to video specialists to cross-border experts—to ensure your clients receive seamless support and access to the full range of Amazon's advertising capabilities.

Key job responsibilities
- Manage strategic accounts and drive business growth by supporting Korea-based advertisers with complex advertising needs, exploring new adoption opportunities, and serving as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders
- Develop and present customized advertising solutions using Amazon's search, display, and video tools, demonstrating how these capabilities can help clients achieve their business objectives
- Lead display and video sales initiatives to drive quota attainment and year-over-year growth, while executing our Korea-to-Worldwide advertising strategy
- Coordinate cross-functional partnerships with account managers, advertising technology specialists, video sales teams, analytics experts, and global advertising teams to deliver seamless support and campaign optimization
- Analyze campaign performance and translate insights into strategy by reviewing performance data, tracking account progress through our CRM systems, and providing consultative guidance to help advertisers succeed in each market

About the team
We're building a world-class advertising organization dedicated to helping Korea-based brands succeed in a global marketplace. Our team combines deep expertise in digital marketing, e-commerce, and streaming with a relentless focus on customer success. We work backwards from advertiser needs to develop solutions that deliver measurable results, whether that's building brand awareness, driving product sales, or reaching new audiences. As part of our group, you'll collaborate with talented colleagues across sales, analytics, creative, and technology teams—both locally and globally—to execute our Korea-to-Worldwide strategy. We're excited about the opportunity to help Korean advertisers tap into Amazon's unique reach and insights, and we're looking for someone who shares that vision and wants to help shape the future of advertising in this region.

jobs.description:
Join Amazon Ads and partner with Korea's leading brands to drive meaningful business results through innovative advertising solutions. You'll own customer relationships, develop strategic media plans, and leverage data-driven insights to help brands reach their audiences across Amazon's suite of advertising solutions —all while working in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment with autonomy to experiment and innovate.

Key job responsibilities
- Build and nurture client relationships with Korea's leading advertisers, serving as their trusted advisor for Amazon Ads solutions and understanding their business objectives
- Drive revenue growth by developing comprehensive media plans and strategic recommendations that guide customer budget allocation across performance advertising and video solutions
- Deliver data-driven insights by analyzing campaign performance, market trends, and advertiser needs to inform strategic decision-making and optimize campaign outcomes
- Collaborate across teams with advertising agencies and internal stakeholders to deliver campaign strategies and seamless customer experiences
- Test and innovate by taking ownership of new approaches and solutions, leveraging the team's autonomy to experiment with strategies that drive results in the Korean market

A day in the life
As an Account Manager, you'll spend your day building trusted partnerships with Korea's leading advertisers. You might start by analyzing campaign performance data to identify optimization opportunities, then present strategic recommendations to your customers about budget allocation across performance and video advertising solutions. You'll collaborate with advertising agencies to refine campaign strategies, coordinate with internal teams to address customer needs, and explore new approaches to solve advertiser challenges. Your role balances deep customer engagement with cross-functional collaboration, allowing you to move quickly and test innovative solutions in a market where your team has the autonomy to shape the future of advertising.

About the team
We're building Amazon Ads' presence in Korea during an exciting period of growth and investment. Our team operates with high autonomy and a bias toward experimentation, allowing us to drive innovation in a dynamic market.
We're committed to understanding advertiser needs deeply and delivering solutions that enhance customer experiences across Amazon's services —from shopping to streaming to music. Joining our team means being part of a group that values speed, curiosity, and ownership while supporting some of the region's most important brands.

jobs.description:
Bez sekcji utrzymania ruchu i infrastruktury, nasza działalność operacyjna może ulec gwałtownemu zahamowaniu. W tej kluczowej części naszego obszernego, ogólnoeuropejskiego zespołu, osoba na stanowisku Planisty ds. utrzymania ruchu i infrastruktury podejmuje najważniejsze decyzje dotyczące wykorzystywanej przez nas technologii w magazynach i sieciach dostaw. W celu zachowania płynności operacji Planista przewiduje problemy, zanim się pojawią i prowadzi nadzór nad sprzętem wymaganym do realizacji różnych zadań. Jako ekspert w zakresie naszego komputerowego systemu zarządzania konserwacją (CMMS) działa skutecznie, wykorzystując swoje umiejętności dostosowywania się do wymogów w szybko zmieniającym się środowisku magazynowym.

Key job responsibilities
Ustalanie, gdzie powinny zostać przydzielone zasoby związane z konserwacją i naprawami, przy zastosowaniu oprogramowania CMMS
Poznanie i wdrażanie standardów UE we wszystkich systemach w swoim obszarze działania
Przeprowadzanie regularnych przeglądów i analiz sprzętu w celu zapewnienia wystarczającej dostępności części zamiennych
Monitorowanie systemu konserwacji w celu zapewnienia, że stan sprzętu jest prawidłowo rejestrowany, a prognozowanie jest dokładne

A day in the life
Głównym zadaniem osoby na stanowisku Planisty ds. utrzymania ruchu i infrastruktury jest zapewnienie, aby nasza działalność operacyjna przebiegała bez zakłóceń. Pracując w jednym z centrów logistycznych, Planista jest odpowiedzialny za zarządzanie zasobami i planowanie konserwacji zapobiegawczej. Zagłębia się w działania mające na celu poprawę wydajności logistycznej, wyznacza wysokie standardy i dokłada wszelkich starań, aby zoptymalizować nasze urządzenia.

Współpracując ściśle z lokalnym zespołem techników, podejmuje decyzje dotyczące prac konserwacyjnych — od małych, pojedynczych części maszyn po całe systemy. Ponadto, razem z członkami naszej ogólnoeuropejskiej sieci, poszukuje nowych, innowacyjnych sposobów, by jeszcze bardziej zwiększyć wydajność.

About the team
The minimum base pay salary for this position is listed below. As a total compensation company, Amazon's package may include further pay components such as a sign on bonus and the eligibility to participate in a restricted stock unit scheme operated independently by Amazon.com Inc. in USA. Your recruiting team will share final base pay and any applicable total compensation elements depending on skills and requirements.
Company discretionary, supplementary benefits apply subject to further terms, including pension plans, health insurance, life and disability insurance, business travel insurance, MultiSport card, discounts for meals at the company’s canteen, employee discount code and program (EDC/Extras), and the Employee Assistance Program (private and confidential counselling and referral service to support health and well-being).

The minimum base pay for this position is 12,066 PLN monthly

jobs.description:
Elevate Financial Strategy at the Forefront of Global Entertainment

We're seeking a strategic financial analyst who will transform data into insights that drive Amazon Prime Video's international growth. In this pivotal role, you'll craft compelling financial narratives that shape critical business decisions and illuminate the path forward for our global entertainment platform.

Key job responsibilities

- Serve as the primary financial partner for Prime Video International, delivering comprehensive financial insights and support
- Develop sophisticated, data-driven financial analyses that illuminate business performance and strategic opportunities
- Consolidate and articulate financial performance across diverse international teams
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify process improvements and technological innovations
- Lead comprehensive financial analysis and support strategic initiatives with precision and creativity


A day in the life
Your day will be a dynamic blend of financial analysis, strategic collaboration, and innovative problem-solving. You'll dive deep into complex financial landscapes, translating intricate data into clear, actionable insights that empower our leadership team to make informed decisions.

About the team
We are a collaborative and forward-thinking finance team dedicated to supporting Prime Video's global expansion. Our work directly impacts how millions of customers experience entertainment worldwide, creating meaningful connections through storytelling and technology.
jobs.description_short: Elevate Financial Strategy at the Forefront of Global EntertainmentWe're seeking a strategic financial analyst who will transform data into insights that drive Amazon Prime Video's international growth.

jobs.description:
Adapt is seeking an Sr. Account Executive to join our European team. This is a permanent position based out of Paris.

Amazon Ads is dedicated to driving measurable outcomes for brand advertisers, agencies, authors, and entrepreneurs. Our ad solutions - including Prime Video Ads, Twitch, and Fire TV - leverage Amazon’s innovations and insights to find, attract, and engage intended audiences throughout their daily journeys. With a range of flexible pricing and buying models, including self-service, managed service, and programmatic ad buying, these solutions help businesses build brand awareness, increase product sales, and more. We start with the customer and work backwards in everything we do, including advertising. If you’re interested in joining a rapidly growing team working to build a unique, world-class advertising group with a relentless focus on the customer, you’ve come to the right place.

This role sits within the Adapt team - a pioneering team that's redefining how we approach customer business. Different from traditional teams within Amazon Ads, Adapt combines human expertise with AI-enhanced analytics to revolutionise business continuity and growth. Our team members are agile professionals who thrive on variety, rotating across multiple strategic assignments to address business-critical needs in teams. This innovative model accelerates professional growth through diverse exposure to multiple facets of Amazon Ads, while leveraging technology to enhance customer value delivery.

This role will be highly agile and fungible, and will see the individual owning deliverables across multiple teams at once. This role will join a team that focuses on a set of priority assignments designed to drive incremental revenue opportunities across multiple books of business. There will be expectations to travel when appropriate, as the role will support our ads businesses across EU5.

Key job responsibilities
* Provide seamless sales support, ensuring continuity and effectiveness in sales operations, while driving revenue across Amazon Ads strategic priorities
* Travel across EU5 primarily to match where the customer is when supporting them through your assignment-based work. We expect up to 50% travel time.
* Generate advertising revenue via ad agencies and advertisers directly, through objective led selling across Streaming TV and other brand-building advertising solutions
* Expertise in programmatic, with a focus on primary DSP and 3P supply sales strategy
* Be a true hunter, hungry to uncover opportunities and connect it with a value adding solution
* Influence buying decisions to drive increased revenue from existing advertisers as well as new revenue streams
* Establishes credible relationships with agencies and advertiser decision makers, in particular in the TV and Digital landscape
* Carry an AI-first approach to selling, using AI tools to drive scale and efficiency in your approach

About the team
Amazon Adapt is a programme designed to offer coverage solutions for business gaps which may occur due to extended leave (parental, medical, sabbatical) and unexpected account transitions or gaps in business needs. Amazon Adapt deploys highly-skilled, hyper-agile talent that ensures customers can continue to invest in their partnerships with Amazon Ads, uninterrupted. The programme ensures that the high bar for customer service, strategic partnership, and revenue attainment is maintained during these coverage gaps.

jobs.description:
Data Center Operations designs, installs & maintains the world’s largest Cloud Computing Infrastructure.
We are looking for skilled Data Center Technician with a passion for technology to help us expand our Cloud to the next level.
Amazon Web Services (AWS) offers an exciting, dynamic and challenging environment encouraging creativity and personal development while maintaining AWS computing environments in a secure, scalable, and cost-effective manner.

This role is a unique opportunity to work in some of the most high-tech data centers in the world. Amazon data centers are large-scale high-density centers where you will be working on changing the face of Cloud technology in the region.

Amazon Data Centers takes customer data with the utmost importance, and selected candidates must be able to perform repetitive tasks without variance and adhere to strict Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) that ensures customer data is protected and properly handled.

Key job responsibilities

Problem Solving
- Maintain a high level of system reliability by prioritizing and resolving trouble tickets efficiently
- Escalation point and technical troubleshooter for all Systems and Network hardware problems
- Escalating to senior technicians and management as needed/required

Technical:
- Troubleshoot technical issues on various platforms ranging from Systems through Networking
- Remediation of physical layer outages, both Systems & Network

Operations:
- Adhere to security and safety best practices in the data center
- Meet 24x7 On-Call requirements and response during shift rotations.
- Install & configure racks of hosts in line with internal SLAs
- Triage & resolve trouble tickets for all devices in your region
- Data Center point of contact for all High Severity issues
- Physical replacement of server and network device parts
- Interact with third party vendors & contractors
- Contribute ideas to improve operational efficiency
- Engage with Remote Hands & Eyes
- Participate in team meetings for metric analysis and project status updates
- Help build the world’s largest Cloud infrastructure

Mentoring:
- Share knowledge and help educate less technical staff on the best practices related to all service owner issues

Hiring:
- Contribute towards building a great team by getting involved in the Amazon hiring process/candidate interviews

A day in the life
Why AWS?
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

Inclusive Team Culture
Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.

Mentorship & Career Growth
We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

About the team
AWS Infrastructure Services (AIS)
AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
jobs.description_short: Data Center Operations designs, installs & maintains the world’s largest Cloud Computing Infrastructure. We are looking for skilled Data Center Technician with a passion for technology to help us expand

- Network Equipment Installation and troubleshooting

- Data Center Operations: Inventory Management, Hot/Cold Aisles, Security
- Experience with Excel and the ability to manipulate data and create necessary charts and diagrams
- Participated in Project Management
- Experience or Knowledge of AWS products: EC2, EBS, S3 etc.

jobs.description:
The Sales Operations Manager will support the country lead with all aspects of product installation and maintenance in Italy as we continue to expand the business. The successful candidate will build and maintain strong relationships with internal and external partners – including service providers, host partners, technology and product management, and the local business development team. The individual must be both analytical and creative, seeking out ways to improve products, processes, and tools, and executing on those ideas. Strong interpersonal skills are also important as the position will have frequent interaction with leadership at Amazon and partner companies. Amazon opened its virtual doors in 1995 and strives to be the world’s most customer-centric company, where customers can find and discover anything they might want to buy online. Amazon Hub PARP is growing and we are working to create a world class delivery experience for customers through alternate delivery options - lockers and pickup points. If you are passionate about delivery operations and look around corners for ways to serve customers, we want your help.

Key job responsibilities
Strategic Leadership & Operations:
• Lead end-to-end installation, maintenance, and post-installation operations (removal, decommissioning, moves, resizing) for Pickup and Return Points across assigned markets
• Drive strategic projects including new product launches (Gen5 lockers), geographic expansion, and process improvements aligned with business objectives
Supplier & Vendor Management:
• Manage complex supplier relationships across installation and maintenance services, negotiating contracts to achieve 90%+ SLA compliance
• Scale supplier capacity strategically, ensuring redundancy on critical services while driving cost reductions
Hardware Sourcing & Inventory Management
• Own hardware sourcing strategy, importation logistics, and inventory management across multiple countries and locker generations
• Optimize inventory allocation through refurbishment programs, cross-country transfers, and demand forecasting to minimize holding costs
Process Optimization & Automation
• Leverage AI tools and low/no-code solutions to streamline operational processes, targeting 15-30% productivity gains through automation
Financial Management:
• Manage program finance including purchase orders, invoice processing, and P&L ownership for assigned cost centers
• Work within imparted budgets while identifying savings opportunities through supplier optimization and process improvements
Stakeholder Management & Influence:
• Partner with cross-functional teams (Business Sales, Quality, Product/Tech, Finance, Marketing) to support business objectives
• Influence internal and external stakeholders through data-driven insights and strategic recommendations
Data Analysis & Performance Management:
• Conduct deep-dive analyses to identify root causes of operational issues and improvement opportunities
• Monitor and report on KPIs including 99%+ uptime targets, DPMO, FTDS, cycle time, and cost performance
• Establish dashboards and alarming mechanisms to proactively flag performance deterioration
Operational Excellence & Change Management:
• Maintain network reliability through proactive maintenance strategies and quality control mechanisms
• Lead teams through operational transformations, new technology implementations, and process redesigns
• Promote adaptability to rapid business changes and scaling requirements

- Experiencia relevante trabajando con MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) en un entorno profesional.

jobs.description:
En Amazon, siempre buscamos oportunidades para empoderar a nuestros socios con lo último en tecnología, con el fin de mejorar la oferta y reducir los costes para nuestros clientes. Una de las formas en que lo hacemos es a través de nuestra red de Centros de Distribución / CF Flex, que implementa los procesos de distribución de Amazon en los almacenes de Vendors y 3PLs, para que dispongan de mayor capacidad de almacenamiento y envío de artículos a los clientes lo más rápido posible.

Te encargarás de uno o más Vendors y/o 3PLs estratégicos. Serás responsable de coordinar los procesos operativos y el flujo de trabajo de los pedidos de los clientes de Amazon, así como de supervisar varios indicadores clave de rendimiento y mantener una comunicación constante con los socios empresariales.

Dado que este puesto puede implicar visitas a los centros de Vendor Flex para ofrecer apoyo in situ, es posible que se requiera carné de conducir.

Key job responsibilities
- Responsabilidad sobre el funcionamiento exitoso y continuo de los procesos operativos de Amazon, así como participación en la coordinación y el desarrollo continuo de todos los procesos en el área de CF Flex, en el marco de la asociación Amazon-Vendor/3PL.
- Seguimiento de los procesos operativos clave dentro del almacén, garantizando la ausencia de defectos. Estos procesos incluyen, entre otros, los de Recepción, Almacenamiento, Picking, Packing, Envío y Transporte, Calidad, Integridad de Stock y Transferencias.
- Contacto directo con los representantes de nuestros Vendors y 3PLs, así como con las funciones de soporte de Amazon de distintos equipos, incluyendo, entre otros, SST, Ventas, Transporte, IT y Desarrollo de Negocio.
- Supervisión y seguimiento de los indicadores clave de rendimiento, en línea con los objetivos generales de CF Flex. Apoyo a la red CF Flex en áreas que incluyen, entre otras, coberturas de almacén, lanzamientos, cierres, reubicaciones y conversiones, así como la ejecución de iniciativas de mejora continua y nuevos proyectos.

A day in the life
Como asistente de logística, actuarás como representante local de Amazon, comunicándote a diario con socios empresariales externos (Vendors y 3PLs) e internos (equipo directivo y otros departamentos, incluyendo, entre otros, SST, Ventas, Transporte, IT y Desarrollo de Negocio). Siempre buscamos formas de mejorar nuestros procesos, y serás una pieza clave en la identificación y ejecución de estas mejoras. Tendrás un sólido conocimiento de las tareas diarias de un asistente de logística y actuarás como referente para Amazon, demostrando compromiso, fiabilidad, buenas prácticas en materia de salud y seguridad, y entregando resultados de alta calidad.

La organización CF Flex implica principalmente la presencia individual del asistente de logística en el centro, con el respaldo de trabajo en equipo y gestión remota, por lo que las habilidades de comunicación son fundamentales. La disposición para viajar es imprescindible, ya que en ocasiones podrás ser movilizado/a a otras ubicaciones de CF Flex para prestar apoyo.
